lines.text: EVERYTHING BECOMES DIFFICULT FROM NOW ON. IMPORTANT
CONTENT NEEDS TO BE HIDDEN. THIS KNOWLEDGE IS ONLY
FOR THE CHOSEN SOUL. ONLY HIS MIND WILL BE HIS HEL
PER. ALL OTHERS THEY GET THE HELP OF OTHERS, WILL FAIL
MISERABLY. THIS OBJECT IS NOT DESIGNED FOR A COLLECTI
VE OR A TOOL. ONLY ONE SOUL WILL REACH ITS DESTINA
A MANUAL WITH INSTRUCTIONS FOR THE ETERNAL LIBRAR
Y IS THE REWARD. BUT THE SEARCH FOR THE TRUTH IS A
DIFFICULT AND LONG JOURNEY. ONLY THE CHOSEN SOUL W
ILL BE ABLE TO UNDERSTAND THE CONTENT. NO ONE WI
LL KNOW WHO GOT THE REWARD. NO ONE WILL KNOW I
TENGRI WILL GUIDE THE CHOSEN SOUL AND GIVE HIM TH
E KEY TO OUR ETERNAL LIBRARY. HE WILL COME TO US A
ND GET A PART OF THE SECRET KNOWLEDGE OF OUR CIVILIZA
TION. THE CHOSEN SOUL WILL UNDERSTAND EVERYTHING O
